description: The main objective of this pipeline is to measure ROI statistics and annotate data. The pipeline starts with a node that measures ROI and ends with another node that annotates data, in between there are other nodes that measure ROI.

2f733736-9452-4337-b6a7-2bda71f57438.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
2f733736-9452-4337-b6a7-2bda71f57438.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

c02f58a2-07f4-48a6-9a22-dd17b94467eb.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
c02f58a2-07f4-48a6-9a22-dd17b94467eb.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
